ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position on the field */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the match is played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the score belongs to */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "penalties_awarded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties awarded in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between points for and against */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the team did not concede any points */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "tries" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions made */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the player did not concede any points */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the season belongs to */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion team of the season */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the runner-up team of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the tournament belongs to */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion team of the tournament */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the runner-up team of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_statistics" (
  "player_match_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
